case_title: TRAN, SANDY et al vs. BERKEY, STEPHEN C. et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, SANDY TRAN, CHERESA
CORRESPONDENCE REC'D FROM PLTF
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 206, MOTION TO REINSTATE JURY TRIAL/JURY DEMAND/SETTLMENT CONFERENCE, CALENDAR OF JUN-04-1999, GRANTED JURY TRIAL -REINSTATED TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-30-1999 AT 09:00 AM

DEPT 210 AJROBERTSON, JUDGE; JJASMIN, CLERK; PEVEZICH, CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY. PLNTF APPR BY SCOTT T. DUNNING, ESQ. DEF APPR BY ROBERT J. HIGGINBOTHAM, ESQ. MOTIONS IN LIMINE ARE RULED UPON. VOIR DIRE OF 40 PROSPECTIVE JURORS IS CONDUCTED. THE COURT EXCUSED OR DEFERRED 4 PROSPECTS. THE PLAINTIFF PEREMPRORILY CHALLENGED 2 PROSPECTIVE JURORS; THE DEFENDANT DID NOT CHALLENGE. THE FOLLOWING WERE SWORN AND IMPANELLED TO TRY THE CAUSE: 1. THOMAS HRSEKO, 2.CELESTE BARTOL, 3.SHU HUAI MAI, 4.EDWARD D. MACKENZIE, 5.DANIEL V. CELIDONIO, 6.LAMISSE DROUBI, 7.LORA BRODSKAYA, 8.TERRY ALLEN ROSCOE, 9.MELINA S. CANDANO, 10.PEDRO JUAN SILVA, 11.A. L. ZEIGLER, 12.JODIE L. BEYER. TWO ALTERNATES, JON EARL STUBER AND ALANA MARY HENNING WERE SWORN WITHOUT OBJECTIONS. THE COURT PROVIDED PRELIMINARY INSTRUCTIONS AND COURT WAS ADJOURNED UNTIL AUGUST 31, 1999 AT 9:30 A.M.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, SANDY TRAN, CHERESA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE JURY TRIAL OF AUG-30-1999 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, SANDY TRAN, CHERESA

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-09-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO COMPLETE ARBITRATION. OSC DIRECTED TO BOTH COUNSEL. BOTH ARE REQUIRED TO APPEAR UNLESS AN AWARD HAS BEEN FILED. HEARING SET FOR MAR-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, SANDY

MOTION TO REINSTATE JURY TRIAL/JURY DEMAND/SETTLMENT CONFERENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BERKEY, STEPHEN C. HEARING SET FOR JUN-03-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

DEPT 210 AJROBERTSON, JUDGE; JJASMIN, CLERK; PEVEZICH, CSR. JURY DELIBERATION RESUMES. PLNTF APPR BY SCOTT T. DUNNING, DEF APPR BY ROBERT J. HIGGINBOTHAM, ESQ. AT 9:15 A.M. THE JURY RESUMES DELIBERATION. AT 2:20 P.M. THE JURY RETURNS WITH A VERDICT WHICH GRANTS $1,565 ECONOMIC DAMAGES TO PLAINTIFF CHERESA TRAN WITH CONTRIBUTORY NEGLIGENCE OF 50% EACH ATTRIBUTABLE TO PLAINTIFF SANDY TRAN AND DEFENDANT STEPHEN C. BERKEY.JURY POLLED AND AT LEAST 9 MEMBERS AGREE AS TO EACH QUESTION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, OUTSIDE PRESENCE OF THE JURY, ALLEGES AN INCONSISTANCY BETWEEN THE ANSWERS TO QUESTIONS 2 AND 4. PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF COUNSEL, THE COURT FURTHER INSTRUCTS THE JURY WHO FURTHER DELIBERATE AND SUBSEQUENTLY RETURN A VERDICT FOR THE DEFENDANT. THE JURY IS POLLED WITH 9 IN AGREEMENT. VERDICT ORDERED FILED. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED TO COUNSEL FOR SAFEKEEPING. JURY THANKED AND DISMISSED.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, SANDY TRAN, CHERESA SERVED NOV-13-1997, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BERKEY, STEPHEN C.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BERKEY, STEPHEN C.

DEPT 210 AJROBERTSON, JUDGE; JJASMIN, CLERK; PEVEZICH, CSR. TRIAL RESUMED. RESPECTIVE COUNSEL ADDRESSED COURT AND JURY WITH OPENING STATEMENTS. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. PLAINTIFF RESTS. DEFENDANT SWORN AND EXAMINED. DEFENSE RESTS. RESPECTIVE COUNSEL PRESENT OPENING AND CLOSING ARGUMENTS. BAILIFF SWORN AND JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE AT 3:20 P.M. COUNSEL STIPULATE JUDGE PRO TEM RALPH J. FLAGEOLLET MAY ACCEPT THE VERDICT IN LIEU OF JUDGE ROBERTSON WHO WILL BE ABSENT FOR THE REMAINDER OF THIS DAY. AT 5:25 THE JURY IS ADMONISHED AND THE CAUSE IS ADJOURNED UNTIL 9:00 A.M. SEP 1, 1999.
